prompt: From the photo-editing app toolbar reference, create a filter-selection overlay with live preview thumbnails.
prompt_refined: Generate a filter-selection overlay for a photo-editing application. This overlay should adopt the clean, white, rounded-rectangle design aesthetic of the toolbar presented in image 1. Position this overlay as a dropdown or pop-up menu, appearing directly below or adjacent to the main toolbar. Within the overlay, display a grid of multiple live preview thumbnails, with each thumbnail showcasing a different applied image filter on a sample image.
objects: Dropdown or pop-up menu appearance for the overlay
Overlay positioned below or adjacent to the main toolbar
Overlay with clean, white, rounded-rectangle design aesthetic
Grid of live preview thumbnails within the overlay
Multiple thumbnails showcasing a sample image
Different applied image filter on each thumbnail
